# SHEET: LoadingLoss

Symbol | Variable | Units | Input | Symbol | Variable | Units | Input

Cg | Generated emission factor | Ib/^3 | #DIV/0! | M | molecular weight of vapors | Ib/^3
G | vapor growth factor | Unitless | 1.02
T | temperature of vapors | deg R

S | Saturation factor | Unitless | 1 | Calculated/Default from AP-42

M | Molecular weight of vapors | Ib/Ib-mole | 66
T | Temperature of bulk liquid | deg R | 540
eff | Overall reduction efficiency | percent | 94
